zh.Roedern, Sachsen, Germany: 多易傑 德莫可拉迪 雷普布利可貝可 德累斯頓可萊斯 格洛斯海洛德
zh.Naundorf, Sachsen, Germany: 德國薩辛維斯費爾斯瑙多福
zh.Of Naundorf, Sachsen, Germany: 德國薩辛可萊斯 梅斯拉德爾瑙多福
zh.lifeSummary: 當Siegfried the Great von Schoenfeld於大約1335年出生在多易傑 德莫可拉迪 雷普布利可貝可 德累斯頓可萊斯 格洛斯海洛德時，他的父親Czaslaw von Schoenfeld32歲，母親Sophie24歲。他於大約1361年與Mrs. Siegfried von Schoenfeld在德國薩辛可萊斯 利薩-格洛斯海艾波斯巴賀洛德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Schoenfeld
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Ernst, Erwin, Franz, Klaus, Adelheid, Eugen, Frieda, Fritz, Gerhard, Hanns.
German (Schönfeld): habitational name from any of numerous places called Schönfeld, from Middle High German schoen ‘beautiful’ + velt ‘open country, field’.
Jewish (Ashkenazic; Schönfeld): artificial name composed of German schön ‘beautiful’ + Feld ‘field’. Compare Schonfeld .

variants.name: Schonfeld
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Chaim, Yoel, Aron, Elihu, Hyman, Mordechi, Naftula, Sholom, Tovia, Zalman.  German Klaus, Erwin, Gunter, Kurt.

variants.name: Schoenfeldt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Arno, Kurt.

nameMeanings.name: Siegfried
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: the
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Dorothea  , also used independently.

nameMeanings.name: Great
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of Margareta, a Latinate form of Margaret . As an independent given name it became fairly popular in the English-speaking world as a result of the fame of the Swedish-born film actress Greta Garbo ( 1905–92 , born Greta Louisa Gustafsson ).

variants.name: Gretta
meanings: Short form of Margareta, a Latinate form of Margaret . As an independent given name it became fairly popular in the English-speaking world as a result of the fame of the Swedish-born film actress Greta Garbo ( 1905–92 , born Greta Louisa Gustafsson ).

en.lifeSummary: When Siegfried the Great von Schoenfeld was born about 1335, in Rödern, Kreis Großenhain, Bezirk Dresden, East Germany, his father, Czaslaw von Schoenfeld, was 32 and his mother, Sophie, was 24. He married Mrs. Siegfried von Schoenfeld about 1361, in Rödern, Ebersbach, Kreis Riesa-Großenhain, Saxony, Germany. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter.

Il a épousé Mrs. Siegfried von Schoenfeld environ 1361, à Rödern, Ebersbach, Kreis Riesa-Großenhain, Sachsen, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Siegfried the Great von Schoenfeld родился около 1335 г. в местности рoдирн, крис гроssенан, безирк дресден, Восточная Германия, его отцу по имени Czaslaw von Schoenfeld было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Sophie, 24.
